# Main

Rulesheet and 350 cards:

* 17 Heroes (14 cards each)  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image1] Angel  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image2] Bishop  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image3] Blade  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image4] Cable  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image5] Colossus  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image6] Daredevil  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image7] Domino  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image8] Elektra  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image9] Forge  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image10] Ghost Rider  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image11] Iceman  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image12] Iron Fist  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image13] Jean Grey  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image14] Nightcrawler  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image15] Professor X  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image16] Punisher  
  * ![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image17] Wolverine  
* 5 Masterminds (5 cards each)  
  * Apocalypse  
  * Kingpin  
  * Mephisto  
  * Mr. Sinister  
  * Stryfe  
* 6 Villain Groups (8 cards each)  
  * Emissaries of Evil  
  * Four Horsemen  
  * Marauders  
  * MLF  
  * Streets of New York  
  * Underworld  
* 2 Henchmen Groups (10 cards each)  
  * Maggia Goons  
  * Phalanx  
* 8 Schemes  
  * Capture Baby Hope  
  * Detonate the Helicarrier  
  * Massive Earthquake Generator  
  * Organized Crimewave  
  * Save Humanity  
  * Steal the Weaponized Plutonium  
  * Transform Citizens into Demons  
  * X-Cutioner's Song  
* 3 Special Bystanders (11 cards total)  
  * 4 x News Reporter  
  * 3 x Paramedic  
  * 4 x Radiation Scientist

Microbadges

![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image18] \- Legendary fan \- X-Men Team  
![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image19] \- Legendary: Dark City fan \- X-Force Team  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image20] \- Legendary fan \- Marvel Knights Team

# Heroes

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Angel***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image21]*** (X-Men)

*Diving Catch* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image22]  
2 Recruit  
When a card effect causes you to discard this card, rescue a Bystander and draw two cards.  
Cost: 4

*High-Speed Chase* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image23]  
Draw two cards, then discard a card.  
Cost: 3

*Drop off a Friend* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image24]  
2+ Attack  
You may discard a card. You get **\+**Attack equal to that card's Cost.  
Cost: 5

*Strength of Spirit* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image25]  
4 Attack  
Discard any number of cards. Draw that many cards.  
Cost: 7

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Bishop***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image26]*** (X-Men)

*Absorb Energies* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image27]  
0+ Recruit  
2 Attack  
Whenever a card you own is KO'd this turn, you get **\+2** Recruit.  
Cost: 3

*Whatever the Cost* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image28]  
Draw a card.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image29]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.  
Cost: 2  
*Art contains a gun*

*Concussive Blast* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image30]  
3+ Attack  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image31], ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image32]: You get **\+3** Attack.  
Cost: 5  
*Bishop absorbs energy, channeling it back into devastating blasts.*

*Firepower from the Future* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image33]  
4+ Attack  
Discard the top four cards of your deck. You get **\+**Attack equal to those cards' printed Attack.  
X-Men: KO any number of those cards.  
Cost: 7  
*Art contains a gun*

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Blade***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image34]*** (Marvel Knights)  
*Art contains a gun*

*Night Hunter* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image35]  
0+ Recruit  
2 Attack  
Whenever you defeat a Villain in the Sewers or Rooftops this turn, you get **\+2** Recruit.  
Cost: 4

*Stalk the Prey* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image36]  
2 Attack  
You may move a Villain to an adjacent city space. If another Villain is already there, swap them.  
Cost: 3

*Nowhere to Hide* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image37]  
3 Attack  
Whenever you defeat a Villain in the Sewers or Rooftops this turn, draw two cards.  
Cost: 6

*Vampiric Surge* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image38]  
0+ Attack  
You get **\+1** Attack for each Villain in your Victory Pile.  
Cost: 7

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Cable***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image39]*** (X-Force)

*Disaster Survivalist* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image40]  
2 Recruit  
When a Master Strike is played, before it takes effect, you may discard this card. If you do, draw three extra cards at the end of this turn.  
Cost: 3

*Strike at the Heart of Evil* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image41]  
2+ Attack  
You get **\+2** Attack only when fighting Masterminds.  
Cost: 4  
*Art contains a gun*

*Rapid Response Force* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image42]  
3+ Attack  
**Teleport**  
X-Force: You get **\+1** Attack for each other X-Force Hero you played this turn.  
Cost: 6  
*Art contains a gun*

*Army of One* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image43]  
5+ Attack  
KO any number of cards from your hand. You get **\+1** Attack for each card KO'd this way.  
Cost: 8  
*Art contains a gun*

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Colossus***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image44]*** (X-Force)

*Draw Their Fire* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image45]  
3 Attack  
You gain a Wound.  
Cost: 1  
*When enemies get charged by a huge steel titan, that tends to occupy their attention.*

*Invulnerability* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image46]  
2 Recruit  
If you would gain a Wound, you may discard this card instead. If you do, draw two cards.  
Cost: 3

*Silent Statue* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image47]  
4+ Attack  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image48]: You get **\+2** Attack.  
Cost: 6  
*No one expects an enormous metal brawler to take the stealthy approach.*

*Russian Heavy Tank* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image49]  
6 Attack  
If another player would gain a Wound, you may reveal this card to gain that Wound and draw a card.  
Cost: 8

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Daredevil***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image50]*** (Marvel Knights)

*Backflip* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image51]  
2 Recruit  
When you play Backflip, the next Hero you recruit this turn goes on top of your deck.  
Cost: 3

*Radar Sense* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image52]  
2+ Attack  
Choose a number, then reveal the top card of your deck. If the card is that Cost, you get **\+2** Attack.  
Cost: 4

*Blind Justice* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image53]  
4 Attack  
Choose a number, then reveal the top card of your deck. If the card is that Cost, draw it.  
Cost: 6

*The Man Without Fear* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image54]  
7 Attack  
Choose a number, then reveal the top card of your deck. If the card is that Cost, draw it and repeat this process.  
Cost: 8

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Domino***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image55]*** (X-Force)  
*Art contains a gun*

*Lucky Break* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image56]  
0+ Recruit  
0+ Attack  
Draw a card.  
X-Force: **Versatile 1**  
Cost: 1

*Ready for Anything* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image57]  
0+ Recruit  
0+ Attack  
**Versatile 2**  
Cost: 3  
*With Domino's mutant probability powers, every day is the luckiest day of her life.*

*Specialized Ammunition* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image58]  
0+ Recruit  
0+ Attack  
You may discard a card from your hand. If that card had a Recruit icon, you get **\+4** Recruit. If that card had an Attack icon, you get **\+4** Attack.  
Cost: 5

*Against All Odds* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image59]  
0+ Recruit  
0+ Attack  
**Versatile 5**  
X-Force: This card and each other **Versatile** ability you use for the rest of this turn produces both Recruit and Attack.  
Cost: 7

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Elektra***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image60]*** (Marvel Knights)

*First Strike* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image61]  
1+ Attack  
If this is the first card you played this turn, you get **\+1** Attack.  
Cost: 1

*Ninjitsu* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image62]  
0+ Recruit  
Draw a card.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image63]: You get **\+2** Recruit.  
Cost: 2  
*Zen is the absence of motion. Ninjitsu, the absence of stillness.*

*Sai Blades* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image64]  
4+ Attack  
You get **\+1** Attack for each Hero you played this turn that costs **1** or **2**.  
Cost: 6

*Silent Meditation* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image65]  
5+ Recruit  
When you play Silent Meditation, the next Hero you recruit this turn goes into your hand.  
Marvel Knights: You get **\+2** Recruit.  
Cost: 7

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Forge***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image66]*** (X-Force)

*Dirty Work* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image67]  
2 Attack  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image68]: Any Villain you fight in the Sewers this turn gets **\-2** Attack.  
Cost: 3  
*Art contains a gun*

*Reboot* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image69]  
2 Recruit  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image70]: You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.  
Cost: 4  
*Art contains a gun*

*Overdrive* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image71]  
0+ Recruit  
0+ Attack  
**Versatile 3**  
Cost: 5  
*When Forge can't find the turret remote, he just takes a couple of spoons and builds a new one.*

*B.F.G.* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image72]  
5 Attack  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image73], ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image74]: Defeat the Mastermind once for free.  
Cost: 7  
*That's a BIG FREAKING GUN\!\!\!\!*  
*Art contains a gun*

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Ghost Rider***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image75]*** (Marvel Knights)

*Blazing Hellfire* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image76]  
2+ Attack  
You may KO a Villain from your Victory Pile. If you do, you get **\+3** Attack.  
Cost: 5

*Hell on Wheels* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image77]  
2+ Recruit  
Marvel Knights: You get **\+2** Recruit.  
Cost: 3  
*Most motorcycles don't drive up walls. Most don't drive into your nightmares.*

*Infernal Chains* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image78]  
Draw a card.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image79]: Defeat a Villain of 3 Attack or less for free.  
Cost: 2

*Penance Stare* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image80]  
3+ Attack  
Each player KOs a Villain from their Victory Pile. You get **\+1** Attack for each Villain KO'd this way.  
Marvel Knights: Put one of those Villains into your Victory Pile.  
Cost: 8

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Iceman***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image81]*** (X-Men)

*Deep Freeze* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image82]  
0+ Recruit  
Draw a card.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image83]: You get **\+1** Recruit for each other ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image84] Hero you played this turn.  
Cost: 2

*Ice Slide* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image85]  
2+ Attack  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image86]: You get **\+1** Attack for each other ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image87] Hero you played this turn.  
Cost: 4

*Frost Spike Armor* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image88]  
3 Attack  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image89]: Draw a card for each ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image90] Hero you played this turn.  
Cost: 5

*Impenetrable Ice Wall* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image91]  
7 Attack  
If a Villain, Master Strike, or Mastermind Tactic would cause you to gain any Wounds or discard any cards, you may reveal this card instead.  
Cost: 8

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Iron Fist***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image92]*** (Marvel Knights)

*Focus Chi* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image93]  
0+ Recruit  
You get **\+1** Recruit for each Hero with a different Cost you have.  
Cost: 3

*Wield the Iron Fist* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image94]  
0+ Attack  
You get **\+1** Attack for each Hero with a different Cost you have.  
Cost: 4

*Ancient Legacy* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image95]  
0+ Recruit  
0+ Attack  
Draw a card.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image96], ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image97]: **Versatile 2**  
Cost: 1

*Living Weapon* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image98]  
8 Attack  
Reveal cards from your deck until you have revealed two cards with the same Cost. Draw all the cards you revealed.  
Cost: 9

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Jean Grey***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image99]*** (X-Men)

*Psychic Search* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image100]  
2 Attack  
X-Men: Rescue a Bystander.  
Cost: 3  
*Amid violent chaos, a soundless voice leads to safety.*

*Read Your Thoughts* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image101]  
3+ Recruit  
Whenever you rescue a Bystander this turn, you get **\+1** Recruit.  
Cost: 5

*Mind Over Matter* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image102]  
4 Attack  
Whenever you rescue a Bystander this turn, draw a card.  
Cost: 6

*Telekinetic Mastery* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image103]  
5+ Attack  
Whenever you rescue a Bystander this turn, you get **\+1** Attack.  
X-Men: Rescue a Bystander for each other X-Men Hero you played this turn.  
Cost: 7

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Nightcrawler***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image104]*** (X-Men)

*Bamf\!* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image105]  
2 Recruit  
**Teleport**  
Cost: 3  
*"Now you see me..." BAMF\!"*

*Blend Into Shadows* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image106]  
2 Attack  
**Teleport**  
Cost: 4  
*Sometimes it is best to hide now and fight later.*

*Swashbuckler* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image107]  
3+ Attack  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image108], ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image109]: You get **\+3** Attack.  
Cost: 5  
*Chivalry wears blue fur.*

*Along for the Ride* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image110]  
5 Attack  
**Teleport**  
When you play or **Teleport** this card, you may also **Teleport** up to three other cards from your hand.  
Cost: 7

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Professor X***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - X-Men Team][image111]*** (X-Men)

*Class Dismissed* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image112]  
2 Recruit  
You may put a Hero from the HQ on the bottom of the Hero Deck.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image113]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.  
Cost: 3  
*"What do they call you? Wheels?"*

*Psionic Astral Form* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image114]  
1+ Attack  
X-Men: You get **\+2** Attack.  
Cost: 2  
*In a plane of pure mental energy, Xavier's body is as powerful as his mind.*

*Telepathic Probe* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Ranged Hero][image115]  
3 Attack  
Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Bystander, you may rescue it. If it's a Villain, you may fight it this turn.  
Cost: 5

*Mind Control* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image116]  
6 Attack  
Whenever you defeat a Villain this turn, you may gain it. It becomes a grey Hero with no text that gives **\+**Attack equal to its Attack. (You still get its VP.)  
Cost: 8

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Punisher***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Marvel Knights team][image117]*** (Marvel Knights)  
*Art contains a gun*

*Boom Goes the Dynamite* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image118]  
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs 0, KO it.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image119]: Draw a card.  
Cost: 2  
*The Punisher always knows which cops are corrupt.*

*Hail of Bullets* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image120]  
2+ Attack  
Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, you get **\+**Attack equal to its printed VP.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image121], ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image122]: You may defeat that Villain for free.  
Cost: 5

*Hostile Interrogation* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image123]  
2+ Recruit  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image124]: Each other player reveals the top card of their deck. If that card costs 4 or more, discard it. You get **\+1** Recruit for each card discarded this way.  
Cost: 3

*The Punisher* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image125]  
4+ Attack  
Reveal cards from the Hero Deck until you have revealed two cards with the same Cost. You get **\+1** Attack for each card revealed this way. Put them on the bottom of the Hero Deck in random order.  
Cost: 8

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Wolverine***  
***![Microbadge: Legendary: Dark City fan - X-Force Team][image126]*** (X-Force)

*Animal Instincts* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image127]  
0+ Attack  
Draw a card.  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image128]: You get **\+2** Attack.  
Cost: 2  
*To avoid injury, it's best to keep a distance from Wolverine of at least 5,000 miles.*

*Sudden Ambush* (5 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image129]  
2+ Attack  
If you drew any extra cards this turn, you get **\+2** Attack.  
Cost: 4

*No Mercy* (3 copies)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image130]  
Draw a card.  
You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.  
Cost: 4

*Reckless Abandon* (1 copy)  
![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image131]  
3 Attack  
Count the number of extra cards you drew this turn. Draw that many cards.  
Cost: 7

# Villains

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Emissaries of Evil***

*Egghead* (2 copies)  
**Ambush**: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, play it.  
**Attack**: 4  
**VP**: 2

*Electro* (2 copies)  
**Ambush**: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Scheme Twist, play it.  
**Attack**: 6  
**VP**: 4

*Gladiator* (2 copies)  
**Ambush**: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Bystander, Gladiator captures it.  
**Attack**: 5  
**VP**: 3

*Rhino* (2 copies)  
**Ambush**: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Master Strike, each player gains a Wound.  
**Escape**: Each player gains a Wound.  
**Attack**: 5  
**VP**: 3

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Four Horsemen***

*Death* (2 copies)  
**Fight**: Each other player reveals their hand and KOs one of their Heroes that costs 1 or more.  
**Escape**: Each player does that same effect.  
**Attack**: 7  
**VP**: 5

*Famine* (2 copies)  
**Fight**: Each other player reveals an ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image132] Hero or discards a card.  
**Escape**: Each player does that same effect.  
**Attack**: 4  
**VP**: 2

*Pestilence* (2 copies)  
**Fight**: Each other player reveals the top three cards of their deck, discards each of those cards that costs 1 or more, and puts the rest back in any order.  
**Escape**: Each player does that same effect.  
**Attack**: 5  
**VP**: 3

*War* (2 copies)  
**Fight**: Each other player reveals an ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image133] Hero or gains a Wound.  
**Escape**: Each player does that same effect.  
**Attack**: 6  
**VP**: 4

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Marauders***

*Blockbuster* (2 copies)  
Blockbuster gets **\+2** Attack for each Bystander he has.  
**Ambush**: If there is a Villain in the Bank that Villain and Blockbuster each capture a Bystander.  
**Attack**: 4+  
**VP**: 2

*Chimera* (2 copies)  
Chimera gets **\+3** Attack for each Bystander she has.  
**Ambush**: Reveal the top three cards of the Villain Deck. Chimera captures all the Bystander cards you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.  
**Attack**: 3+  
**VP**: 3

*Scalphunter* (2 copies)  
Scalphunter gets **\+1** Attack for each Bystander he has.  
**Ambush**: Each player chooses a Bystander from their Victory Pile. Scalphunter captures those Bystanders.  
**Attack**: 4+  
**VP**: 2

*Vertigo* (2 copies)  
**Fight**: Each player discards all the cards in their hand, then draws as many cards as they discarded.  
**Attack**: 5  
**VP**: 3

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***MLF***

*Forearm* (2 copies)  
To fight Forearm, you must also reveal four Hero cards with different card names.  
**Attack**: 4\*  
**VP**: 4

*Reignfire* (2 copies)  
**Escape**: Reignfire becomes a Master Strike that takes effect immediately.  
**Attack**: 6  
**VP**: 4

*Wildside* (2 copies)  
**Fight**: If you fight Wildside in the Sewers or Bank, KO two of your Heroes.  
**Attack**: 5  
**VP**: 3

*Zero* (2 copies)  
To fight Zero, you must also discard three cards that cost 0\.  
**Attack**: 0\*  
**VP**: 2

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Streets of New York***

*Bullseye* (2 copies)  
**Fight**: KO one of your Heroes with a Recruit icon and one of your Heroes with an Attack icon.  
**Attack**: 6  
**VP**: 4

*Hammerhead* (2 copies)  
Bribe  
**Fight**: KO one of your Heroes with a Recruit icon.  
**Attack**: 5\*  
**VP**: 2

*Jigsaw* (2 copies)  
**Ambush**: Each player discards three cards, then draws two cards.  
Bribe  
**Attack**: 11\*  
**VP**: 5

*Tombstone* (2 copies)  
Bribe  
**Escape**: Each player reveals a ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image134] Hero or gains a Wound.  
**Attack**: 8\*  
**VP**: 4

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Underworld***

*Azazel* (2 copies)  
**Fight**: A card in your hand gains Teleport this turn.  
**Attack**: 4  
**VP**: 2

*Blackheart* (2 copies)  
**Ambush**: The player to your right reveals a Marvel Knights Hero or gains a Wound.  
**Fight**: Same effect.  
**Escape**: Same effect.  
**Attack**: 6  
**VP**: 4

*Dracula* (2 copies)  
**Ambush**: Dracula captures the top card of the Hero Deck. Dracula gets **\+**Attack equal to that card's Cost.  
**Fight**: Gain that card.  
**Attack**: 3+  
**VP**: 4

*Lilith, Daughter of Dracula* (2 copies)  
**Escape**: Each player without Dracula in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.  
**Attack**: 5  
**VP**: 3

# Henchmen

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Maggia Goons***  
**Bribe**  
**Fight**: KO one of your Heroes.  
**Attack**: 4\*  
**VP**: 1

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Phalanx***  
**Fight**: Reveal a ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Tech Hero][image135] Hero or KO one of your Heroes with an Attack icon.  
**Attack**: 3  
**VP**: 1

# Bystanders

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***News Reporter*** (4 copies)  
When you rescue this Bystander, draw a card.  
VP: 1

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Paramedic*** (3 copies)  
When you rescue this Bystander, you may KO a Wound from your hand or from any player's discard pile.  
VP: 1

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Radiation Scientist*** (4 copies)  
When you rescue this Bystander, you may KO one of your Heroes or a Hero from your discard pile.  
VP: 1

# Schemes

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Capture Baby Hope***  
**Setup**: 8 Twists. Put a token on this Scheme to represent the baby, Hope Summers.  
**Twist**: If a Villain has the baby, that Villain escapes. Otherwise, the baby is captured by the closest Villain to the Villain Deck. (If there are no Villains, do nothing.)  
**Special Rules**: The Villain with the baby gets **\+4** Attack. If you defeat that Villain, rescue the baby to your Victory Pile (until the next Twist). The baby is worth **6** VP at the end of the game. If a Villain escapes with the baby, stack a Twist next to the Mastermind and return the baby to this Scheme card.  
**Evil Wins**: When there are 3 Twists stacked next to the Mastermind.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Detonate the Helicarrier***  
**Setup**: 8 Twists. 6 Heroes in the Hero Deck.  
**Special Rules**: Whenever a Hero is KO'd from the HQ, turn that Hero face down on that HQ space, representing an Explosion on the Helicarrier. When an HQ space has 6 Explosions, that space is Destroyed and can't hold Heroes anymore.  
**Twist**: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme. Then for each Twist in that stack, KO the leftmost Hero in the HQ and immediately refill that space.  
**Evil Wins**: When all HQ spaces are Destroyed or the Hero Deck runs out.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Massive Earthquake Generator***  
**Setup**: 8 Twists.  
**Twist**: Each player reveals a ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Strength Hero][image136] Hero or KOs the top card of their deck.  
**Evil Wins**: When the number of non grey Heroes in the KO pile is 3 times the number of players.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Organized Crime Wave***  
**Setup**: 8 Twists. Include 10 Maggia Goons as one of the Henchman Groups.  
**Special Rules**: Goons also have the ability "Ambush: Play another card from the Villain Deck."  
**Twist**: Each Goon in the city escapes. Shuffle all Goons from each players' Victory Piles into the Villain Deck.  
**Evil Wins**: When 5 Goons escape.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Save Humanity***  
**Setup**: 8 Twists. 24 Bystanders in the Hero Deck. (1 player: 12 Bystanders in the Hero Deck)  
**Special Rules**: You may spend **2** Recruit to rescue a Bystander from the HQ.  
**Twist**: KO all Bystanders in the HQ. Then each player reveals an ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Instinct Hero][image137] Hero or KOs a Bystander from their Victory Pile.  
**Evil Wins**: When the number of Bystanders KO'd and/or carried off is 4 times the number of players.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Steal the Weaponized Plutonium***  
**Setup**: 8 Twists representing Plutonium. Add an extra Villain Group.  
**Twist**: This Plutonium is captured by the closest Villain to the Villain Deck. If there are no Villains in the city, KO this Plutonium. Either way, play another card from the Villain Deck.  
**Special Rules**: Each Villain gets **\+1** Attack for each Plutonium it has. When a Villain with any Plutonium is defeated, shuffle that Plutonium back into the Villain Deck.  
**Evil Wins**: When 4 Plutonium have been carried off by Villains.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Transform Citizens Into Demons***  
**Setup**: 8 Twists. Villain Deck includes 14 extra Jean Grey cards and no Bystanders.  
**Twist**: Stack 5 Bystanders face down next to the Scheme. Bystanders stacked here are "Demon Goblin" Villains. They have **2** Attack. Players can fight these Demon Goblins to rescue them as Bystanders.  
**Special Rules**: Each Jean Grey card counts as a "Goblin Queen" Villain. It's worth **4** VP. It has Attack equal to its Cost plus the number of Demon Goblins stacked next to the Scheme.  
**Evil Wins**: When 4 Goblin Queen cards escape.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***X-Cutioner's Song***  
**Setup**: 8 Twists. Villain Deck includes 14 cards for an extra Hero and no Bystanders.  
**Special Rules**: Whenever you play a Hero from the Villain Deck, that Hero is captured by the closest enemy to the Villain Deck. Each Villain gets **\+2** Attack for each Hero it has. When you fight an enemy, gain all the Heroes captured by that enemy.  
**Twist**: KO all Heroes captured by enemies. Then play another card from the Villain Deck.  
**Evil Wins**: 9 non grey Heroes are KO'd or carried off.

# Masterminds

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Apocalypse***

**Always Leads**: Four Horsemen  
Four Horsemen Villains get **\+2** Attack  
**Apocalypse Wins**: When Famine, Pestilence, War, and Death have escaped  
**Master Strike**: Each player reveals their hand and puts all their Heroes that cost 1 or more on top of their deck.  
Attack: 12  
VP: 6

*Apocalyptic Destruction*  
**Fight**: Each other player KOs two Heroes from their discard pile that each cost 1 or more.

*The End of All Things*  
**Fight**: Each other player reveals the top three cards of their deck, KOs each one of those cards that cost 1 or more, and puts the rest back in any order.

*Horsemen Are Drawing Nearer*  
**Fight**: Each other player plays a Four Horsemen Villain from their Victory Pile as if playing it from the Villain Deck.

*Immortal and Undefeated*  
**Fight**: If this is not the final Tactic, rescue six Bystanders and shuffle this Tactic back into the other Tactics.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Kingpin***

**Bribe**  
**Always Leads**: Streets of New York  
**Master Strike**: Each player reveals a Marvel Knights Hero or discards their hand and draws 5 cards.  
Attack: 13\*  
VP: 6

*Call a Hit*  
**Fight**: Choose a Hero from each player's discard pile and KO it.

*Criminal Empire*  
**Fight**: If this is not the final Tactic, reveal the top three cards of the Villain Deck. Play all the Villains you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.

*Dirty Cops*  
**Fight**: Put a 0 Cost Hero from the KO pile on top of each other player's deck.

*Mob War*  
**Fight**: Each other player plays a Henchman Villain from their Victory Pile as if playing it from the Villain Deck.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Mephisto***

Whenever a player gains a Wound, put it on top of that player's deck.  
**Always Leads**: Underworld  
**Master Strike**: Each player reveals a Marvel Knights Hero or gains a Wound.  
Attack: 10  
VP: 6

*Damned If You Do...*  
**Fight**: Each other player KOs a Bystander from their Victory Pile or gains a Wound.

*Devilish Torment*  
**Fight**: Each other player puts all 0 Cost cards from their discard pile on top of their deck in any order.

*Pain Begets Pain*  
**Fight**: Choose any number of Wounds from your hand and discard pile. The player to your right gains them.

*The Price of Failure*  
**Fight**: Each other player without a Mastermind Tactic in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Mr. Sinister***

Mr. Sinister gets **\+1** Attack for each Bystander he has.  
**Always Leads**: Marauders  
**Master Strike**: Mr. Sinister captures a Bystander. Then each player with exactly 6 cards reveals a ![Microbadge: Legendary fan - Covert Hero][image138] Hero or discards cards equal to the number of Bystanders Mr. Sinister has.  
Attack: 8  
VP: 6

*Human Experimentation*  
**Fight**: Mr. Sinister captures Bystanders equal to the number of Villains in the city.

*Master Geneticist*  
**Fight**: Reveal the top seven cards of the Villain Deck. Mr. Sinister captures all of the Bystanders you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.

*Plans Within Plans*  
**Fight**: Mr. Sinister captures a Bystander for each Mr. Sinister Tactic in players' Victory Piles, including this Tactic.

*Telepathic Manipulation*  
**Fight**: Mr. Sinister captures a Bystander from each other player's Victory Pile.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_***Stryfe***

**Always Leads**: MLF  
**Master Strike**: Stack this Master Strike next to Stryfe.  
Stryfe gets **\+1** Attack for each Master Strike stacked next to him. Each player reveals an X-Force Hero or discards a card at random.  
Attack: 7  
VP: 6

*Furious Wrath*  
**Fight**: Reveal the top six cards of the Villain Deck. Play all the Master Strikes you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.

*Psychic Torment*  
**Fight**: Look at the top five cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the rest.

*Swift Vengeance*  
**Fight**: A Wound from the Wound Stack becomes a Master Strike that takes effect immediately.

*Tide of Retribution*  
**Fight**: Each other player reveals an X-Force Hero or gains a Wound.

# Keywords

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_**Teleport**: Instead of playing, you may set aside a card with the keyword "**Teleport**". If you do, add it to your new hand at the end of your turn as an extra card.

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_**Bribe**: You can fight villains with the keyword "**Bribe**" by spending any combination of Attack and/or Recruit points. For example, you may play two S.H.I.E.L.D. Agents and two S.H.I.E.L.D. Troopers to fight the **\+4** Attack Maggia Goons."

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_**Versatile**: When you play a card with the keyword "**Versatile**" you must first choose between Recruit and Fight. Once you have chosen, the card provides recruit or fight equal to the **Versatile** value. For example, **Versatile 3** gives you **\+3** Recruit or **\+3** Attack.
